calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Reset To May-27-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Petitioner: Jennifer Kathryn Bauman, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Liah Mclean Redwood
Decree signed in open court
